2604.06829.title: WRAP++: Web discoveRy Amplified Pretraining
2604.06829.paper_summary: Synthetic data rephrasing has emerged as a powerful technique for enhancing knowledge acquisition during large language model (LLM) pretraining. However, existing approaches operate at the single-document level, rewriting individual web pages in isolation. This confines synthesized examples to intra-document knowledge, missing cross-document relationships and leaving facts with limited associative context. We propose WRAP++ (Web discoveRy Amplified Pretraining), which amplifies the associative context of factual knowledge by discovering cross-document relationships from web hyperlinks and synthesizing joint QA over each discovered document pair. Concretely, WRAP++ discovers high-confidence relational motifs including dual-links and co-mentions, and synthesizes QA that requires reasoning across both documents. This produces relational knowledge absent from either source document alone, creating diverse entry points to the same facts. Because the number of valid entity pairs grows combinatorially, this discovery-driven synthesis also amplifies data scale far beyond single-document rewriting. Instantiating WRAP++ on Wikipedia, we amplify ~8.4B tokens of raw text into 80B tokens of cross-document QA data. On SimpleQA, OLMo-based models at both 7B and 32B scales trained with WRAP++ substantially outperform single-document approaches and exhibit sustained scaling gains, underscoring the advantage of cross-document knowledge discovery and amplification.
2604.06829.paper_summary_zh: 合成數據重述已成為增強大型語言模型（LLM）預訓練期間知識獲取的強大技術。<lb/>然而，現有的方法僅在單一文檔層面運作，孤立地重寫個別網頁。<lb/>這使得合成的例子僅限於文檔內部知識，錯過了跨文檔的關係，並留下了有限的關聯上下文事實。<lb/>我們提出了WRAP++（網頁發現增強預訓練），通過從網絡超鏈接中發現跨文檔關係，並對每對發現的文檔進行聯合問答合成，來增強事實知識的關聯上下文。<lb/>具體而言，WRAP++發現高置信度的關聯主題，包括雙鏈接和共同提及，並合成需要跨兩個文檔推理的問答。<lb/>這產生了在任一源文檔中都不存在的關聯知識，為相同事實創造了多樣的切入點。<lb/>由於有效實體對的數量以組合方式增長，這種基於發現的合成也將數據規模放大到遠超單一文檔重寫的程度。<lb/>在維基百科上實現WRAP++，我們將約84億個原始文本標記增強為800億個跨文檔問答數據。<lb/>在SimpleQA上，基於OLMo的模型在7B和32B規模下使用WRAP++訓練後，顯著超越了單一文檔的方法，並顯示出持續的擴展增益，突顯了跨文檔知識發現和增強的優勢。
2604.06829.author: Jiang Zhou et.al.
2604.06829.authors: Jiang Zhou, Yunhao Wang, Xing Wu, Tinghao Yu, Feng Zhang
